title: Spina's HPacks
description: A mid game instant healing item with a keybind to use it from outside your inventory
body:
Health Packs are a mid game instant healing item heavily inspired by Deadspace thats pretty much all you need to know
(Plays extremely well with other mods that make the game brutal like Scape N Run)

    Basic Health Pack Stats          

Health Packs restore 3 hearts apon use
Extinguishes fire on user
However it also accelerates hunger decay temporarily
 

Health Packs can be swiftly used from outside of your inventory using a keybind

This keybind is called Quick Health Pack Use and the default bind is G and is found in the Misc section
![The Key Bind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2beb9cb1230662c3bd6c3659eaf4e3787357c023.png)
 

Health Packs dont have their own creative tabs like other mods instead Health Packs are found in the combat tab
![Health Pack In Combat Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/088449f4c7e6e3c2c5fe49da2658d1270e9aaaef.png)


 

Health Packs in survival have 2 basic components to be crafted:

Medical Grade Injectable Canister (Item on right)
Gold Gel (Item on left)
 ![Health Pack Components In Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8492243b7c5a2c3b962125f94da0aebe3f1bbd9a.png)



 

Gold Gel's Crafting Recipe

![Gold Gel Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0600f94ee8c377f8ccfff4d892ca406f2ca1ac.png)

 

The Medical Grade Injectable Canister's Crafting Recipe

![Canister Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db1ba5998625694ab694290af1271ad04592f480.png)

 

And finaly the health pack itself

![Health Pack Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c53d2b109ffce6356a40385f9907ba9639f66cc.png)

 

(Also when getting a health pack for the first time you will get a achievement thats a refrence to Deadspace)

 ![The Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe0a88160b99871721f76c6ff15b3754c61b7aa1.png)

 

 

(I have not tested this mod on a server however it should work just fine)

(I also recomend playing with JEI since theres no way to get the recipe in game for any items)
